headings.usage: Use for all headlines (Hero, section titles). Apply tracking-tight for a bubbly, compact feel.

body.usage: Use for body copy, paragraphs, button text, and input labels. Very legible and friendly.

visual_enhancers.borders_and_shadows: Neo-brutalist / Playful. Use solid offset shadows (e.g., shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#1A1B41]) and thick borders (border-2 or border-4) with the dark text color for a sticker/comic vibe.
visual_enhancers.border_radius: Extremely rounded to feel soft and safe for kids. rounded-full for pills/buttons, rounded-3xl for cards.
visual_enhancers.textures: Include subtle noise or dot-grid patterns on pastel backgrounds to give a tactile, premium feel and avoid digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.forbidden: No transparent header backgrounds that overlap content unreadably. No thin, fragile borders.

component_guidelines.buttons: Thick border, solid offset shadow, pill-shaped, bold text. Hover states should translate down (translate-y-1) and remove shadow to feel like pressing a physical tactile button.
component_guidelines.cards: Pastel backgrounds, thick dark borders, rounded-3xl. Interactive cards (like products) should scale up slightly on hover.
component_guidelines.inputs: Thick borders, large padding (p-4), rounded-xl. Focus state: ring-4 with primary pink color. Avoid native default select arrows.
component_guidelines.customizer_panel: Scrollable right-hand panel with distinct sections for Colors, Characters, Size, and Name. Use large touch-friendly circular targets for colors.

grids.features: Bento Grid (Mode A: Tetris Grid). Asymmetric layout with one large featured block (e.g., 'Soporte Ortopédico') and smaller supporting blocks. Gap-8.
grids.catalog: 3-column grid on desktop, 1-column mobile. Gap-6. Give each item a soft pastel background card.

layouts.hero: Center aligned massive kinetic text, layered with a giant floating shoe image. Include the 'DISEÑA TUS TENIS' CTA prominently. Use overflow-hidden carefully to let elements overlap.
layouts.customizer: Desktop: 2 columns (sticky preview 50%, scrollable options 50%). Mobile: Stacked with preview sticky at top.
layouts.manifesto: Alternating left/right image and text blocks with massive decorative numbers (01, 02, 03) anchoring the background of each section.

motion.hero_reveal: Masked line-by-line reveal for the H1 using Framer Motion (stagger children).
motion.scrolling: Lenis smooth scroll integration is mandatory for that premium feel.
motion.physics: Bouncy, energetic spring animations. type: 'spring', stiffness: 200, damping: 15.

accessibility.focus_states: High contrast rings (ring-4 ring-pink-500) around inputs and buttons.
accessibility.color_contrast: Ensure text over pastel backgrounds uses the dark text color (#1A1B41) instead of white, for maximum APCA contrast.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.

media.treatment: Images should have rounded corners (rounded-2xl) and thick dark borders matching the playful aesthetic. Cut-out PNGs of shoes should float with a heavy drop-shadow.

3d_libraries.recommendation: Use Framer Motion with 2D cutouts and z-index layering for parallax and floating depth. It guarantees high performance and fits the vibrant playful aesthetic perfectly without needing WebGL.

image_urls.description: White and orange athletic shoe - Great for the hero image bursting through the text.
Young girl running in grass - For 'Máxima Comodidad' manifesto chapter.
Orange cartoon character - Selectable character patch for personalization.
Blue character with hat - Selectable character patch for personalization.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure React JS (.jsx/.js files), NOT TypeScript (.tsx/.ts). Avoid TS types entirely.
Integrate Google Fonts 'Fredoka' and 'Nunito' into the global CSS/HTML.
Implement Lenis smooth scrolling for a premium, award-winning feel.
Use framer-motion heavily. Elements should bounce into place using 'spring' animations (stiffness: 200, damping: 15).

Build the interactive 'Diseñador de Tenis' (Shoe Customizer): left side sticky preview of the shoe that changes color/theme dynamically (e.g., using CSS hue-rotate or overlay blending), right side scrollable config.
For the 'DISEÑA TUS TENIS' CTA in the hero, make it massively visible with a bouncy hover state.
Use lucide-react icons but set strokeWidth={3} to match the bubbly aesthetic.
Implement a fast marquee using react-fast-marquee with alternating solid and stroke-outline text (e.g., text-transparent outline-2).
Store customizer form and contact form submissions in the simulated/mock DB. Ensure the submission UX has a success toast using Sonner.
All copy MUST be in Spanish as requested ('Inicio', 'Productos', 'Blog', 'Contacto', 'Diseña Tus Tenis').
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not use generic, centered, flat layouts. Layer elements with z-index hierarchy and negative space.
Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover states, transitions). Static = dead.
Do not apply `transition: all` universally as it breaks framer-motion transforms.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Never use AI assistant Emoji characters (e.g., 🤖🧠💭💡) for icons. Rely on Lucide.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
Do not center-align the main App container.
